text:
switch kind {
case .long:
  return "-l '\(name.fishEscapeForSingleQuotedString())'"
case .short:
  return "-s '\(name.fishEscapeForSingleQuotedString())'"
case .longWithSingleDash:
  return "-o '\(name.fishEscapeForSingleQuotedString())'"
}

switch type {
case .file:
  UInt16(S_IFREG)
case .directory:
  UInt16(S_IFDIR)
case .symlink:
  UInt16(S_IFLNK)
}
